title: hepteireca glandulosa
intro: Hepteireca glandulosa, also known as the Western Heal-All, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its white flowers and hairy, glandular leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hepteireca glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
